name: Frank Lewin
abstract: Frank Lewin (March 27, 1925 – January 18, 2008) was an American  composer and teacher.

about_quotes.speaker: Dick Hyman
about_quotes.evidence: Occasionally I came on some film score, I remember distinctly there was a very accomplished composer/writer named Frank Lewin who did the music for several different programs... he wrote... It required great reading skills and I remember those were dates you didn’t fall asleep on.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dick Hyman interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clearwater Beach, Florida, March 17, 2001 [interview 2 of 2]
